label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out if it's possible to tile an 8x8 chessboard with two diagonally opposite corners removed using 31 dominoes. Each domino covers two adjacent squares. Hmm, let me think. First, I remember that a standard chessboard has 64 squares, right? And dominoes cover two squares each, so 32 dominoes would be needed for a full board. But here, they've removed two squares, so we have 62 squares left, which would require 31 dominoes.
